creator: owen@easytarget.me.uk
text:
I have hit this too; appears to be a staging issue.

The vwebp component is part of the examples tree for this port and I 
have 'OPTIONS_UNSET= EXAMPLES' in /etc/make.conf, I'm wondering is this 
is related. I didn't have time to investigate further.

I successfully worked around it by:
cd /usr/ports/graphics/webp ; make -DNO_STAGE install clean
